description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring a mix of white and gray exterior walls. The structure is set on a green lawn with a paved driveway and a small tree near the entrance, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The main building is accompanied by a detached garage or secondary structure, both with simple rectangular forms. Large windows are visible on the main facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is bordered by sidewalks and driveways, indicating integration into a neighborhood layout. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and open space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray walls, large windows, and a detached garage, set on a green lawn with paved driveways.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a small tree near the entryway.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the main facade, entry, and the detached garage to the left.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back of the bungalow, the garage, and the connecting driveway.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back of both the main building and the garage, with visible green lawn areas.
